site.description: Eclipse plug-ins from all9s Solutions for Java editor productivity.

category-def.name: com.all9ssolutions.category.suite
category-def.label: all9s Solutions - Complete Suite
category-def.description: Installs all all9s Solutions Eclipse productivity tools.

category-def.name: com.all9ssolutions.category.ender
category-def.label: all9s Solutions - Ender
category-def.description: Installs Ender and its Eclipse help content.

category-def.name: com.all9ssolutions.category.lumberjack
category-def.label: all9s Solutions - Lumberjack
category-def.description: Installs Lumberjack and its Eclipse help content.
